mapper.sql: pe.work_card, pe.name, pe.name_abbreviation, pe.gender, pe.id_number, pe.birthday, pe.height, pe.weight, pe.calendar, pe.nation, pe.marital_status, pe.household_character, pe.address, pe.zipcode, pe.household_address, pe.household_zipcode, pe.collective_household_flag, pe.collective_address, pe.native_place, pe.work_attendance_flag, pe.workshop_attendance_flag, pe.employee_type, pe.leave_flag, pe.occupation_category, pe.occupation_type, pe.email_inside, pe.administration_category, pe.remarks, pe.attribute1, pe.attribute2, pe.attribute3, pe.attribute4, pe.attribute5, pe.enabled_flag, pe.id, pe.registered_residence, pe.create_time, pe.create_by, pe.update_time, pe.update_by, pe.photo_id as pep_id,pe.company_age,pe.worked_years, pe.photo_id,pe.ten_year_date, pe.twenty_year_date, pe.paid_annual_leave, (select count(id) from pm_employee_job pejj where pejj.employee_id = pe.id and pejj.enabled_flag = 1 and pejj.job_main_flag = 0) job_quantity, case when pe.occupation_type like '%市场销售%' then 1 else 0 end as sales_flag

${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.name as ${tAlias}_name, ${tAlias}.name_abbreviation as ${tAlias}_name_abbreviation, ${tAlias}.gender as ${tAlias}_gender, ${tAlias}.id_number as ${tAlias}_id_number, ${tAlias}.birthday as ${tAlias}_birthday, ${tAlias}.height as ${tAlias}_height, ${tAlias}.weight as ${tAlias}_weight, ${tAlias}.calendar as ${tAlias}_calendar, ${tAlias}.nation as ${tAlias}_nation, ${tAlias}.marital_status as ${tAlias}_marital_status, ${tAlias}.household_character as ${tAlias}_household_character, ${tAlias}.address as ${tAlias}_address, ${tAlias}.zipcode as ${tAlias}_zipcode, ${tAlias}.household_address as ${tAlias}_household_address, ${tAlias}.household_zipcode as ${tAlias}_household_zipcode, ${tAlias}.collective_household_flag as ${tAlias}_collective_household_flag, ${tAlias}.collective_address as ${tAlias}_collective_address, ${tAlias}.native_place as ${tAlias}_native_place, ${tAlias}.work_attendance_flag as ${tAlias}_work_attendance_flag, ${tAlias}.workshop_attendance_flag as ${tAlias}_workshop_attendance_flag, ${tAlias}.employee_type as ${tAlias}_employee_type, ${tAlias}.leave_flag as ${tAlias}_leave_flag, ${tAlias}.occupation_category as ${tAlias}_occupation_category, ${tAlias}.occupation_type as ${tAlias}_occupation_type, ${tAlias}.email_inside as ${tAlias}_email_inside, ${tAlias}.administration_category as ${tAlias}_administration_category, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.attribute4 as ${tAlias}_attribute4, ${tAlias}.attribute5 as ${tAlias}_attribute5, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.registered_residence as ${tAlias}_registered_residence, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.photo_id as ${tAlias}_pep_id, ${tAlias}.company_age as ${tAlias}_company_age, ${tAlias}.worked_years as ${tAlias}_worked_years, ${tAlias}.ten_year_date as ${tAlias}_ten_year_date, ${tAlias}.twenty_year_date as ${tAlias}_twenty_year_date, ${tAlias}.paid_annual_leave as ${tAlias}_paid_annual_leave, (select count(id) from pm_employee_job pejj where pejj.employee_id = pe.id and pejj.enabled_flag = 1 and pejj.job_main_flag = 0) ${tAlias}_job_quantity

select
,0 as set_check, datediff(year, pe.birthday, GETDATE()) - (case WHEN month(GETDATE()) < month(pe.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE (case WHEN month(GETDATE()) = month(pe.birthday) AND day(GETDATE()) < day(pe.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) END) AS age, fdev.ext_dept_name AS dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS department, fdev.ext_team_name AS team, se.cost_center as se_cost_center,se.cost_center_num as se_cost_center_num, (CASE WHEN EXISTS (select 1 from employee_temp_check_v cv where cv.employee_id = pe.id) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) need_check,
(select top 1 isnull(pet.name, '') from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pet on pet.id = fu.employee_id and pet.enabled_flag = 1 where fu.id = pe.update_by and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as update_by_str, (case when exists (select 1 from pm_employee_job_transfer pejt_t where pejt_t.employee_id = pe.id and pejt_t.transfer_type != '初始化' and pejt_t.enabled_flag = 1 ) then 1 else 0 end) as job_transfer_flag,
,
, fj.job_class as pej_fj_job_class,
, ISNULL(peen.id, -1) peen_id,
, ISNULL(pee.id, -1) pee_id,
, ISNULL(pet.id, -1) pet_id,
, ISNULL(pev.id, -1) pev_id,
, ISNULL(pett.id, -1) pett_id,
, ISNULL(peee.id, -1) peee_id,
from pm_employee pe left join pm_employee_photo pep on pe.photo_id = pep.id left join pm_employee_leaveoffice pel on pe.id = pel.employee_id left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_job fj on pej.job_id = fj.id left outer join swm_employee se on pe.id=se.employee_id and se.work_flag=1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 outer apply ( select top(1) peen_ap.* from pm_employee_entry peen_ap where peen_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peen_ap.enabled_flag = 1 ) peen outer apply ( select top(1) pee_ap.* from pm_employee_education pee_ap where pee_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pee_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pee_ap.new_education_flag = 1 ) pee outer apply ( select top(1) pet_ap.* from pm_employee_title pet_ap where pet_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pet_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pet_ap.new_title_flag = 1 ) pet outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) pev_ap.* FROM pm_employee_vocational pev_ap WHERE pev_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pev_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pev_ap.new_vocational_flag = 1 ) pev outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) pett_ap.* FROM pm_employee_tele pett_ap WHERE pett_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pett_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pett_ap.tele_type = 2 order by id desc ) pett outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) peee_ap.* FROM pm_employee_emergency peee_ap WHERE peee_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peee_ap.enabled_flag = 1 order by id desc ) peee

select
,0 as set_check, datediff(year, pe.birthday, GETDATE()) - (case WHEN month(GETDATE()) < month(pe.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE (case WHEN month(GETDATE()) = month(pe.birthday) AND day(GETDATE()) < day(pe.birthday) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) END) AS age, fdev.ext_dept_name AS dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS department, fdev.ext_team_name AS team, (CASE WHEN EXISTS (select 1 from employee_temp_check_v cv where cv.employee_id = pe.id) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) need_check,
(select top 1 isnull(pet.name, '') from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pet on pet.id = fu.employee_id and pet.enabled_flag = 1 where fu.id = pe.update_by and fu.enabled_flag = 1 ) as update_by_str, (case when exists (select 1 from pm_employee_job_transfer pejt_t where pejt_t.employee_id = pe.id and pejt_t.transfer_type != '初始化' and pejt_t.enabled_flag = 1 ) then 1 else 0 end) as job_transfer_flag,
,
,
, ISNULL(peen.id, -1) peen_id,
, ISNULL(pee.id, -1) pee_id,
, ISNULL(pet.id, -1) pet_id,
, ISNULL(pev.id, -1) pev_id,
, -1 pett_id, pett.tele pett_tele , ISNULL(peee.id, -1) peee_id,
from pm_employee pe left join pm_employee_photo pep on pe.photo_id = pep.id left join pm_employee_leaveoffice pel on pe.id = pel.employee_id left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 outer apply ( select top(1) peen_ap.* from pm_employee_entry peen_ap where peen_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peen_ap.enabled_flag = 1 ) peen outer apply ( select top(1) pee_ap.* from pm_employee_education pee_ap where pee_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pee_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pee_ap.new_education_flag = 1 ) pee outer apply ( select top(1) pet_ap.* from pm_employee_title pet_ap where pet_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pet_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pet_ap.new_title_flag = 1 ) pet outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) pev_ap.* FROM pm_employee_vocational pev_ap WHERE pev_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pev_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pev_ap.new_vocational_flag = 1 ) pev outer apply (select left(aa.tele_ap, len(aa.tele_ap) -1) as tele from (select (SELECT pett_ap.tele + '/' FROM pm_employee_tele pett_ap WHERE pett_ap.employee_id = pe.id and pett_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pett_ap.tele_type = 2 for xml path('')) tele_ap) aa ) pett outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) peee_ap.* FROM pm_employee_emergency peee_ap WHERE peee_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peee_ap.enabled_flag = 1 order by id desc ) peee
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee (work_card, name, name_abbreviation, gender, id_number, birthday, height, weight, calendar, nation, marital_status, household_character, address, zipcode, household_address, household_zipcode, collective_household_flag, collective_address, native_place, work_attendance_flag, workshop_attendance_flag, employee_type, leave_flag, occupation_category, occupation_type, email_inside, administration_category, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, attribute4, attribute5, enabled_flag,registered_residence,photo_id,company_age,worked_years, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, ten_year_date, twenty_year_date, paid_annual_leave ) values (#{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nameAbbreviation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, #{height,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{calendar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{householdZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{collectiveHouseholdFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{collectiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workAttendanceFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{workshopAttendanceFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{employeeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leaveFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{occupationCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{occupationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{emailInside,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{administrationCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT},#{registeredResidence,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{employeePhoto.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{companyAge,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{workedYears,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{tenYearDate,jdbcType=DATE},#{twentyYearDate,jdbcType=DATE},#{paidAnnualLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL} )
mapper.update: update pm_employee set work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, name_abbreviation = #{nameAbbreviation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gender = #{gender,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, id_number = #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, birthday = #{birthday,jdbcType=DATE}, height = #{height,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, calendar = #{calendar,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, nation = #{nation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, marital_status = #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_character = #{householdCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zipcode = #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_address = #{householdAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_zipcode = #{householdZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, collective_household_flag = #{collectiveHouseholdFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, collective_address = #{collectiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, native_place = #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_attendance_flag = #{workAttendanceFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, workshop_attendance_flag = #{workshopAttendanceFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, employee_type = #{employeeType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leave_flag = #{leaveFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, occupation_category = #{occupationCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, occupation_type = #{occupationType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, email_inside = #{emailInside,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, administration_category = #{administrationCategory,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute4 = #{attribute4,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute5 = #{attribute5,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, registered_residence = #{registeredResidence,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, company_age = #{companyAge,jdbcType=BIGINT}, worked_years = #{workedYears,jdbcType=BIGINT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, ten_year_date = #{tenYearDate, jdbcType = DATE}, twenty_year_date = #{twentyYearDate,jdbcType=DATE}, paid_annual_leave = #{paidAnnualLeave,jdbcType=DECIMAL} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: order by id
mapper.update: update pm_employee set height = #{height,jdbcType=NUMERIC}, weight = #{weight,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, marital_status = #{maritalStatus,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_character = #{householdCharacter,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, zipcode = #{zipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_address = #{householdAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, household_zipcode = #{householdZipcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, collective_household_flag = #{collectiveHouseholdFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, collective_address = #{collectiveAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, native_place = #{nativePlace,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

UPDATE PE SET PE.company_age = datediff(month, pee.entry_time, GETDATE()) - (case WHEN day(GETDATE()) < day(pee.entry_time) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) FROM PM_EMPLOYEE PE JOIN pm_employee_entry PEE ON PE.ID = PEE.employee_id WHERE datediff(month, pee.entry_time, GETDATE()) - (case WHEN day(GETDATE()) < day(pee.entry_time) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) != ISNULL(pe.company_age, -999) AND PE.leave_flag = 0 AND PE.enabled_flag = 1 AND PEE.entry_time IS NOT NULL and pee.entry_time < GETDATE()
mapper.select:
select pe.id,pe.work_card,pe.name, (select fd1.dept_name from fnd_dept fd, pm_employee_job pej,fnd_dept fd1 where pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.dept_id = fd.id and fd.ext_dept_id = fd1.id AND pej.enabled_flag =1 ) as dept_name,
(select fd1.dept_name from fnd_dept fd, pm_employee_job pej,fnd_dept fd1 where pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.dept_id = fd.id and fd.ext_department_id = fd1.id AND pej.enabled_flag =1 ) as department,
(select fd1.dept_name from fnd_dept fd, pm_employee_job pej,fnd_dept fd1 where pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.dept_id = fd.id and fd.ext_team_id = fd1.id AND pej.enabled_flag =1 ) as team, peen.entry_time as peen_entry_time, pee.education as pee_education,pet.title_name as pet_title_name, fj.job_name as job_name
from pm_employee pe outer apply ( select top(1) peen_ap.* from pm_employee_entry peen_ap where peen_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peen_ap.enabled_flag = 1 ) peen outer apply ( select top(1) pee_ap.* from pm_employee_education pee_ap where pee_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pee_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pee_ap.new_education_flag = 1 ) pee outer apply ( select top(1) pet_ap.* from pm_employee_title pet_ap where pet_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pet_ap.enabled_flag = 1 AND pet_ap.new_title_flag = 1 ) pet left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_job fj on fj.id = pej.job_id and fj.enabled_flag = 1
where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and (pe.work_card like #{nameOrWorkCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR} or pe.name like #{nameOrWorkCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR} ) and not exists ( select se.work_card from swm_employee se where se.work_flag = 1 and right(cast('000000'+rtrim(se.work_card) as varchar),6) = right(cast('000000'+rtrim(pe.work_card) as varchar),6)
)
where pe.id = (select top 1 id from pm_employee where leave_flag = 1 and enabled_flag = 1 and id_number = #{idNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by id desc)

select pe.id,pe.name, pe.work_card, pe.email_inside, fdev.ext_dept_name AS dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS department, fdev.ext_team_name AS team, pej.job_name as pej_fj_job_name, 0 as need_check from pm_employee pe left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0
mapper.update: update pm_employee set email_inside = #{emailInside, jdbcType = VARCHAR} where id = #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}
mapper.select: { call msp_copy_employee_childrens(#{oldEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{nowEmployeeId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}) }

select DISTINCT pe.id,pe.name,pe.work_card from pm_employee pe, pm_employee_job pej, fnd_dept fd where fd.admin_job_id = pej.job_id and pej.employee_id = pe.id and fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.admin_job_id is not null and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.enabled_flag = 1

select DISTINCT pe.id,pe.name,pe.work_card from pm_employee pe where pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.enabled_flag = 1
and (pe.name like #{criteria.nameAndWork,jdbcType=VARCHAR} or pe.work_card like #{criteria.nameAndWork,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

select pe.id as employee_id ,tpee.entry_time as entry_time ,tpec.start_time as contract_start_time ,tpec.end_time as contract_end_time ,fdev.ext_dept_name AS dept_name ,fdev.ext_department_name AS department ,fdev.ext_team_name AS team ,pej.job_name as job_name ,pe.name as name ,pe.work_card as work_card ,pe.id_number as id_number , pett.tele as tele, pej.dept_id as dept_id from fnd_user fu join pm_employee_job pej on fu.employee_id = pej.employee_id and fu.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 join pm_employee pe on pe.id = fu.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0 outer apply (select top(1) pee.* from pm_employee_entry pee where pee.employee_id = fu.employee_id AND pee.enabled_flag = 1) tpee outer apply (select top(1) pec.* from pm_employee_contract pec where pec.employee_id = fu.employee_id and pec.enabled_flag = 1 and new_contract_flag = 1) tpec outer apply (SELECT TOP(1) pett_ap.* FROM pm_employee_tele pett_ap WHERE pett_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND pett_ap.enabled_flag = 1 order by id desc ) pett where fu.id = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT}

select (select top 1 pe.work_card from pm_employee_job pej join fnd_job fj on fj.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_id = fj.id and fj.deleted_flag = 0
join fnd_dept fd on fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.id = tempd.dept_id and fd.admin_job_id = fj.id
join pm_employee pe on pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.leave_flag = 0
where pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1
) as current_manager, case when tempd.depart_id is null then null else (select top 1 pe.work_card from pm_employee_job pej join fnd_job fj on fj.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_id = fj.id and fj.deleted_flag = 0
join fnd_dept fd on fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.id = tempd.depart_id and fd.admin_job_id = fj.id
join pm_employee pe on pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.leave_flag = 0
where pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1
) end as current_supervisor from
(select (select temp.id from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_dept_id = temp.id) as dept_id, (select temp.id from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_department_id = temp.id) as depart_id, (select temp.id from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_team_id = temp.id) as team_id from fnd_dept fd where fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and fd.id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) tempd

select (select top 1 pe.work_card from pm_employee_job pej join fnd_job fj on fj.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_id = fj.id and fj.deleted_flag = 0
join fnd_dept fd on fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.id = tempd.dept_id and fd.admin_job_id = fj.id
join pm_employee pe on pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.leave_flag = 0
where pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.id != (select employee_id from fnd_user where id = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT})
) as current_manager, case when tempd.depart_id is null then null else (select top 1 pe.work_card from pm_employee_job pej join fnd_job fj on fj.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_id = fj.id and fj.deleted_flag = 0
join fnd_dept fd on fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.id = tempd.depart_id and fd.admin_job_id = fj.id
join pm_employee pe on pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.id = pej.employee_id and pe.leave_flag = 0
where pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe.id != (select employee_id from fnd_user where id = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT})
) end as current_supervisor, (select case when EXISTS (select 1 from fnd_dept fdt where fdt.admin_job_id = tempd.job_id ) then 1 else 0 end) as leader_flag from (select pe.work_card, pe.name, (select temp.id from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_dept_id = temp.id) as dept_id, (select temp.id from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_department_id = temp.id) as depart_id, (select temp.id from fnd_dept temp where fd.ext_team_id = temp.id) as team_id, (select fj.job_name from fnd_job fj where fj.id = pej.job_id and fj.enabled_flag = 1 and fj.deleted_flag = 0 ) as job_name, (select fj.id from fnd_job fj where fj.id = pej.job_id and fj.enabled_flag = 1 and fj.deleted_flag = 0 ) as job_id from fnd_user fu join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and fu.enabled_flag = 1 join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id left join fnd_dept fd on pej.dept_id = fd.id where pe.enabled_flag =1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and fu.id = #{userId, jdbcType = BIGINT} ) tempd

select pe.work_card from fnd_user fu join fnd_users_roles fur on fu.id = fur.user_id and fu.enabled_flag =1
join fnd_role fr on fur.role_id = fr.id and fr.permission = #{permission, jdbcType = VARCHAR} join pm_employee pe on pe.id = fu.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1

select isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) as email from fnd_user fu join fnd_users_roles fur on fu.id = fur.user_id and fu.enabled_flag =1
join fnd_role fr on fur.role_id = fr.id and fr.permission = #{permission, jdbcType = VARCHAR} join pm_employee pe on pe.id = fu.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag = 1

select pej.employee_id, isnull(pe.email_inside, fu.email) as email from fnd_dept fd left join pm_employee_job pej on pej.dept_id = fd.id and fd.admin_job_id = pej.job_id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.enabled_flag = 1 left join fnd_user fu on fu.employee_id = pej.employee_id left join pm_employee pe on fu.employee_id = pe.id and pe.enabled_flag =1 where fd.id = #{deptId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.sql: SELECT pe.id AS employee_id, pe.work_card AS work_card, pej.job_name AS job_name, pe.NAME AS NAME, fdev.ext_dept_name AS dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS department, fdev.ext_team_name AS team FROM pm_employee pe LEFT OUTER JOIN pm_employee_job pej ON pe.id = pej.employee_id LEFT OUTER JOIN fnd_dept_ext_v fdev ON pej.dept_id = fdev.id AND fdev.enabled_flag = 1 AND fdev.deleted_flag = 0 WHERE pej.job_main_flag =1 AND pej.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.leave_flag = 0
mapper.select: and ( fdev.ext_dept_name = '公司领导' OR pej.job_name LIKE '%总监' OR pej.job_name LIKE '%高级经理' OR pe.work_card = '000146' OR pe.work_card = '000256' OR pe.work_card = '000193' ) ORDER BY pe.work_card ASC

select pe.* from fnd_dept fd left outer join fnd_job fj on fd.admin_job_id = fj.id left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pej.job_id = fj.id left outer join pm_employee pe on pej.employee_id = pe.id where fd.id = #{deptId, jdbcType = BIGINT} and fd.enabled_flag = 1 and fd.deleted_flag = 0 and fj.enabled_flag = 1 and fj.deleted_flag = 0 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0

select pe.id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.work_card) > 0 then pe.work_card else null end as work_card, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.name) > 0 then pe.name else null end as name, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.name_abbreviation) > 0 then pe.name_abbreviation else null end as name_abbreviation, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.gender) > 0 then pe.gender else null end as gender, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.id_number) > 0 then pe.id_number else null end as id_number, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.calendar) > 0 then pe.calendar else null end as calendar, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.nation) > 0 then pe.nation else null end as nation, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.marital_status) > 0 then pe.marital_status else null end as marital_status, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.household_character) > 0 then pe.household_character else null end as household_character, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.address) > 0 then pe.address else null end as address, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.zipcode) > 0 then pe.zipcode else null end as zipcode, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.household_address) > 0 then pe.household_address else null end as household_address, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.household_zipcode) > 0 then pe.household_zipcode else null end as household_zipcode, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.collective_address) > 0 then pe.collective_address else null end as collective_address, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.native_place) > 0 then pe.native_place else null end as native_place, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.registered_residence) > 0 then pe.registered_residence else null end as registered_residence, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.employee_type) > 0 then pe.employee_type else null end as employee_type, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.occupation_category) > 0 then pe.occupation_category else null end as occupation_category, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.email_inside) > 0 then pe.email_inside else null end as email_inside, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.administration_category) > 0 then pe.administration_category else null end as administration_category, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, pe.remarks) > 0 then pe.remarks else null end as remarks from pm_employee pe where pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( pe.work_card,pe.name,pe.name_abbreviation,pe.gender,pe.id_number,pe.calendar,pe.nation,pe.marital_status,pe.household_character, pe.address,pe.zipcode,pe.household_address,pe.household_zipcode,pe.collective_address,pe.native_place,pe.registered_residence, pe.employee_type,pe.occupation_category,pe.occupation_type,pe.email_inside,pe.administration_category,pe.remarks ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
mapper.update:
-- 将要离职的在职人员的带薪年假每日更新任务， 此sql必须在updatePaidAnnualLeaveEveryDay执行完毕后执行，不然参考值越来越小，导致年假越来越少 update pe set paid_annual_leave = case when SUBSTRING(convert(varchar(20), ((datediff(dd, convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + '-01-01', pla.approve_leave_date) + 1) / convert(decimal(10,3),365)) * pe.paid_annual_leave), CHARINDEX('.', convert(varchar(20), ((datediff(dd, convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + '-01-01', pla.approve_leave_date) + 1) / convert(decimal(10,3),365)) * pe.paid_annual_leave)) + 1, 1 ) >= 5 then convert(int, (convert(decimal(10,3), ((datediff(dd, convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + '-01-01', pla.approve_leave_date) + 1) / convert(decimal(10,3),365) * pe.paid_annual_leave)))) + convert(float, 0.5) else convert(int, (convert(decimal(10,3), ((datediff(dd, convert(varchar(4), year(getdate())) + '-01-01', pla.approve_leave_date) + 1) / convert(decimal(10,3),365) * pe.paid_annual_leave)))) end from pm_employee pe join pm_leave_approval pla on pe.id = pla.employee_id and pla.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pla.approve_leave_date is not null and year(pla.approve_leave_date) = year(getdate()) and (pla.approval_status = 'inApproval' or pla.approval_status = 'pass') and pe.paid_annual_leave != 0 and pe.paid_annual_leave is not null outer apply ( select top(1) peen_ap.* from pm_employee_entry peen_ap where peen_ap.employee_id = pe.id AND peen_ap.enabled_flag = 1 ) peen where 1 = 1 and pe.employee_type <> '临时员工'
and pe.work_card = #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: SELECT CASE WHEN EXISTS (select 1 FROM pm_employee pe WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 AND pe.id <> #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT} and pe.work_card = #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR} ) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS have_same_work_card_flag, CASE WHEN EXISTS (select 1 FROM pm_employee pe WHERE pe.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.leave_flag = 0 and pe.id_number = #{idNumber, jdbcType = VARCHAR} AND pe.id <> #{id, jdbcType = BIGINT}) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS have_same_id_number_flag
mapper.update: update PE set ten_year_date = #{tenYearDate, jdbcType=DATE}, twenty_year_date = #{twentyYearDate, jdbcType=DATE}, supplement_social_security_date = getdate() FROM PM_EMPLOYEE PE where PE.leave_flag = 0 AND PE.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and pe.work_card = #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}

update PE set ten_year_date = null, twenty_year_date = null, supplement_social_security_date = null FROM PM_EMPLOYEE PE where PE.leave_flag = 0 AND PE.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.name = #{name, jdbcType = VARCHAR} and pe.work_card = #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
mapper.select: select * from pm_employee where work_card = #{workCard, jdbcType = VARCHAR}
select id, work_card, name, id_number, from pm_employee
